name: Garibaldi Resources Corp.
summary: Garibaldi Resources Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties in Canada and Mexico. The company explores for nickel, copper, cobalt, and magmatic sulphide deposits, as well as gold, silver, and palladium deposits. It holds a 100% interest in E&L property and palm spring property located in northwest British Columbia. The company also has an option to acquire a 100% interest in Sid, Sunrise & Atlin property located in the Omenica mining division in British Columbia. In addition, it holds interests in Black Gold, Tora Tora, and Golden Bea properties. Garibaldi Resources Corp. was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
